description: Style Note fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference the style of the contemporary using ethnic garments and fabric. This sari perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its styling and colour patterning. This beautiful piece has been hand block printed - a lengthy process which ensures that each sari has a unique hand-crafted touch. Choose this sari to express your appreciation of traditional techniques and to support Indian craftspeople who are keeping these art forms alive. Product DetailsPink Kota printed sari with contrast yellow and green details Material and Care Cotton/silkDry Clean only Size Length: 5.36 metres (no blouse piece)
